info.name: Federal Bureau of Investigation Retrieve list of FBI wanted individuals

params.name: field_offices
params.description: Filter by specific FBI field offices (e.g., miami, new-york, los-angeles).

params.name: page
params.description: Specifies the page of results to return (used for pagination).

params.name: sort_on
params.description: Specifies the field to sort results by (e.g., title, reward, etc.).

params.name: sort_order
params.description: Specifies the order of the sorting (asc or desc).

items.docs: Fetches a list of FBI wanted individuals, with optional filters for field offices and paging.
